query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.alunoId, u.consultorId as userConsultorId, u.role, u.isActive FROM users u WHERE u.alunoId IN (SELECT a.id FROM alunos a WHERE a.consultorId IN (SELECT id FROM consultors WHERE name LIKE '%Adriana%'));
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.alunoId, u.consultorId as userConsultorId, u.role, u.isActive FROM users u WHERE u.alunoId IN (SELECT a.id FROM alunos a WHERE a.consultorId IN (SELECT id FROM consultors WHERE name LIKE '%Adriana%'));
